title: rubia fruticosa subsp. melanocarpa
intro: Rubia fruticosa subsp. melanocarpa, also known as Himalayan madder, is a subspecies of the Rubia fruticosa plant, a type of flowering plant in the madder family. This plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubia fruticosa subsp. melanocarpa include improving digestion, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
